channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Juan Soto introduced by Mets at Citi Field after striking record $765 million, 15-year deal
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Juan Soto put on a New York Mets jersey and cap for the first time Thursday after his record $765 million, 15-year contract was finalized and talked about what made the difference in his decision. “They showed me a lot of love.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Georgiev to make San Jose Sharks debut vs. St. Louis Blues
item.description: San Jose Sharks and Alexandar Georgiev will face the St. Louis Blues at the Enterprise Center on Thursday to finish a six-game, 13-day road trip.
item.dc:creator: Curtis Pashelka, The Mercury News

item.title: Raiders player Charles Snowden facing misdemeanor DUI charge after Las Vegas arrest
item.description: Las Vegas Raiders football player Charles Snowden was arrested in Las Vegas on a misdemeanor charge of driving under the influence and released from custody.
item.dc:creator: Ken Ritter, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: The fate of Tropicana Field's repairs lies in the hands of St. Pete City Council
item.description: The St. Pete City Council will vote on Thursday afternoon to begin the process of repairing Tropicana Field or not.
item.dc:creator: Alessandra Young, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Wander Franco trial postponed due to no-show witnesses
item.description: Tampa Bay Rays shortstop Wander Franco is scheduled to go to trial Thursday in the Dominican Republic in a sexual abuse case involving a 14-year-old girl.
item.dc:creator: MARTÍN ADAMES Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: With Dybantsa in the house, BYU blasts Fresno State
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The highest rated recruit in BYU basketball history was at the Marriott Center Wednesday to watch his future team cruise to victory. AJ Dybantsa was witness to a 28-point drubbing by the Cougars over Fresno State, 95-67.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Ohio politician proposes bill to make flag planting a felony after fight in Michigan rivalry game
item.description: An Ohio politician has seen enough flag planting by visiting sports teams. Republican state Rep. Josh Williams said Wednesday on social media he’s introducing a bill to make flag planting in sports a felony in the state. His proposal comes after the Nov.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bill Belichick, University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill finalize coaching deal: reports
item.description: Bill Belichick has reportedly been tapped as the next head coach for the University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill.
item.dc:creator: Brayden Stamps, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: White Sox trade Garrett Crochet to Red Sox for prospect package
item.description: CHICAGO — The Chicago White Sox have traded ace starter Garrett Crochet to the Red Sox for a prospect package. The White Sox are getting back catcher Kyle Teel, who is the 25th ranked prospect in baseball by MLB.com.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: Hall has goal and assist, Soderblom stops 29 shots as Blackhawks beat Rangers 2-1
item.description: Taylor Hall had a goal and an assist, Arvid Soderblom stopped 29 shots and the Chicago Blackhawks beat the New York Rangers 2-1 on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: We only know 1 of the teams in the upcoming Rose Bowl game so far. Here's why
item.description: We now know the matchup of college football's most prestigious event, the Rose Bowl Game, "The Granddaddy of Them All," that will take place on Jan. 1. Well at least we know half of it.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: First 12-team College Football Playoff set, Oregon seeded No. 1 and SMU edges Alabama for last spot
item.description: The tournament starts Dec. 20-21 with four first-round games involving teams seeded 5-12. It concludes Jan. 20 with the national title game in Atlanta.
item.dc:creator: Eddie Pells, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Tourigny wins 100th game as Utah HC beats Buffalo, 5-2
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Michael Kesselring had a goal and an assist for the Utah Hockey Club, which handed the Buffalo Sabres their sixth straight loss with a 5-2 win at KeyBank Center on Saturday. "It's good for the confidence," Kesselring said.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utes drop first home game to St. Mary's, 72-63
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Runnin' Utes had won its first six home games by an average margin of 32 points. But they hadn't played a team as talented as Saint Mary's. The Gaels came into the Huntsman Center Saturday, and led by Paulius Murauskas, beat the utes, 72-63.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Willy Adames agrees to $182 million, 7-year deal with the Giants, AP source says
item.description: Willy Adames has agreed to a $182 million, seven-year contract with San Francisco, providing the Giants with a power-hitting shortstop in the prime of his career, according to a person familiar with the negotiations.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: What happens when 'The Simpsons' join 'Monday Night Football'? Find out during Bengals-Cowboys
item.description: On Monday night, the entire Simpsons universe gets to experience it in a way not many could have imagined. The prime-time matchup between the Cincinnati Bengals and Dallas Cowboys will also take place at Springfield’s Atoms Stadium as part of “The Simpsons Funday Football” alternate broadcast.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Utes drop five-set thriller to Marquette to end season
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah women's volleyball team rallied from being down two sets to none against Marquette, only to lose the fifth and deciding set 15-12 to end their incredible turnaround season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Montrose Red Hawks receives send off before title game
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)— Montrose High School’s Red Hawks are on the brink of history, entering the state championship game with a perfect record. For a team that hasn’t claimed a title in more than 70 years, the stakes couldn’t be higher.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Utah State expected to hire Bronco Mendenhall
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - It looks like Bronco Mendenhall is coming back to Utah. Utah State is expected to announce the former BYU head coach as its new head football coach as soon as Friday. ESPN reporter Pete Thamel was the first to break the news.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utes sweep College of Charleston in NCAA Tournament
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Utah's incredible turnaround season isn't done yet. After going 11-19 in 2023, the Utes Volleyball team has advanced to the second round of the NCAA Tournament after a three-set sweep over the College of Charleston Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
